channel.title: Releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in Releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important Expect security releases to appear here within 24 hours of being reported upstream. Release Created Date Description 2.2.17 2019-03-30T19:41:26Z Features/Updates: Minor README.md improvements Patch for Paragraphs endless loop Revert menu_breadcrumb to 1.7 + lock Update wxt_bootstrap to 1.9 Resolve additional issues with gcweb legacy port Update wxt_bootstrap to 1.6 Add guard for language detection in search block 2.

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important Releases will soon start to appear for Drupal 8 once stable releases are made. Release Created Date Description 2.2.17 2019-03-30T19:41:26Z Features/Updates: Minor README.md improvements Patch for Paragraphs endless loop Revert menu_breadcrumb to 1.7 + lock Update wxt_bootstrap to 1.9 Resolve additional issues with gcweb legacy port Update wxt_bootstrap to 1.6 Add guard for language detection in search block 2.
